title: Verdict Reversal Trigger
description: Specific conditions that would change the deal verdict

id.description: Unique identifier for this reversal trigger (e.g., trigger_001)

condition.description: Human-readable description of the condition that triggers reversal

current_value.description: Current observed value of the metric or condition being monitored

trigger_threshold.description: Value or state at which the trigger fires and the verdict would change

probability.description: Estimated probability that this trigger fires within the investment horizon (0.0-1.0)

verdict_change.description: The verdict transition that occurs if this trigger fires

severity.description: Severity of the verdict impact if this trigger fires

reason.description: Explanation of why this condition would flip the verdict

monitoring.description: Data source or process used to track whether this trigger is approaching

mitigation.description: Action that could prevent or neutralize this trigger
